titleStmt.title: SII 22.101: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 101. (A.R. No. 101 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: The inscription is in modern characters (of about the 18th century A.D.) and is dated Khara, Śittirai 15. It records the gift of a house-site, 48 feet in width, on the east street by the temple authorities of Tāmtōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiyanayiṉār at Śaṇbai to a person by name Śivaṉ Kāḷatti-nayiṉār of Narippari-nāḍu for the construction of a maṭha thereon, and the privilege of collecting annually ten paṇam each from the temple and the residents of the place as tirukkaivaḻakkam for its maintenance.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . kara varuṣam cittirai mātam 10 5 tiyati caṇpai Uṭaiyār tiruttām toṉṟi Āḷuṭaiyanayiṉār koyil paṇṭārattār narippari nāṭṭil civaṉ kāḷattinayiṉārkku taṉmacātaṉam
paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi nāḷatumutal caṇpaiyil kiḻakku tiruvitiyil kiḻciṟakil kempu Irāvuttaṉ Irunta maṉaikku vaṭakku paṇipeṇṭāṭṭi malli maṉaikku teṟku tiruvitikku kiḻakku
naṉtavaṉattukku meṟku Iṉṉāṅku Ellaikku Uḷppaṭṭa maṉai Oṉṟukku Aṭi 4 10 8 Inta maṉai tāṅkaḷ maṭam kaṭṭikkoṇṭu Iruntu tirukkaivaḻakkam koyil paṇṭārattile pattu paṇamum
Uḷḷūrilum cirmaiyilum pattu paṇamum Āka varuṣattukku Irupatu paṇamum vaṟttiṉai Āka paṟṟikkoṇṭu cantiṟātittavaraiyum cukattile Irukkakaṭavarkaḷā kavum Ippaṭi cammatittu
taṉmacātaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Inta maṭattukku yātoruttar Akutam coṉṉa Avarkaḷ keṅkai karaiyil kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavaṉṉākavum naripparināṭṭu
c civaṉukku caṇpai koyil paṇṭārattārom Ivai nāṟpatteṇ ṇāyiranampi Eḻuttu Ivai Ālāla nampi Eḻuttu Ivai periyanāṭṭu veḷār Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
